reviews.comment:
La comida muy mala. Ni siquiera tienen para calentar un simple sándwich. Te los venden fríos de las heladeras.

(Translated by Google)
The food is terrible. They don't even have enough to heat a simple sandwich. They sell them cold from the refrigerator.
